data.title: Brainstorm confirmation questions have ambiguous yes/no semantics
data.description: When brainstorm asks confirmation questions like 'Does this capture it correctly, or is anything missing?', answering 'yes' is ambiguous — it could mean 'yes it captures it correctly' or 'yes something is missing'. Confirmation prompts that request a clear yes/no answer should have unambiguous meaning. Either use single-clause questions ('Does this capture it correctly?') or use explicit labeled options instead of yes/no.
